display.name: Waystone Toll
display.short_description: A leaning waystone marks an old patrol road. Fresh coins lie in a crack beneath it, but the stone is wrapped in briars that bite when touched.

choices.label: Take the hidden purse
choices.summary: Work the coins free before the briars close and pocket what the road forgot.

choices.label: Rip the guide-pin loose
choices.summary: The iron pin comes free, but the wrapped briars open your palm and take blood for the toll.
